prompt: A close-up portrait of AvotuChar, a male fire-elf with deep crimson skin and pitch-black obsidian eyes. He has a sad and thoughtful expression. His hair is a voluminous crown of living black flames and dark smoke, with no physical hair strands. Grimdark dark fantasy style, desaturated, high contrast.

A close-up portrait of AvotuChar, a male fire-elf with deep crimson skin and solid black eyes. Sad facial features, noble sharp jawline. His hair is purely composed of volumetric shifting black fire and dark smoke. Realistic grimdark oil-painting texture.
A profile view of AvotuChar, a male fire-elf with crimson skin and a sad expression. His hair is a crown of thick living black flames. No physical hair. Dark desaturated atmosphere with falling ash.
A portrait of AvotuChar looking down in sorrow. Crimson skin, black obsidian eyes. Voluminous black flame hair rising from his head. Grimdark cinematic lighting, desaturated.
A portrait of AvotuChar looking up at a dark sky. Noble fire-elf features, crimson skin, black eyes. Thick black fire hair blowing in the wind. Ash rain environment.
An extreme close-up of AvotuChar, focusing on the solid black obsidian eyes and the transition from crimson skin to black volumetric fire hair. Highly detailed skin texture, grimdark style.
A medium shot of AvotuChar walking through ash-covered ruins. Male fire-elf with crimson skin and black flame hair. Wearing dark weathered armor. Desaturated grey world.
A medium shot of AvotuChar channeling dark energy between his hands. Glowing hands, black fire hair, solid black eyes, crimson skin. Dark magical atmosphere.
A medium shot of AvotuChar in a defensive stance in a dark haunted forest. Black flame hair, red skin, black eyes. Embers and ash in the air.
A medium shot of AvotuChar sitting on debris. Melancholy pose, black fire hair flickering, crimson skin. Grimdark ash-filled world.
A medium profile shot of AvotuChar staring at distant ruins. Black obsidian eyes, black flame hair, red fire-elf skin. High contrast cinematic lighting.
A full body shot of AvotuChar standing on a charred cliff edge. Noble fire-elf, crimson skin, voluminous black flame hair. Looking over a vast desolated ash valley.
A full body shot of AvotuChar walking through a skeletal forest of burnt trees. Black fire hair, red skin, weathered dark armor. Atmospheric ash rain.
A medium shot of AvotuChar kneeling and touching grey ash. Sad expression, noble features, solid black eyes, black fire hair. Profound sorrowful mood.
A full body shot from behind AvotuChar, looking at a distant tower on a dark horizon. Thick black fire hair rising from his head. Dark weathered armor, ash rain.
